title: Crispy Nutty Uruguayan Jerusalem Artichoke Salad
description: A fresh, low‑carb salad that blends tender poached Jerusalem artichokes with toasted walnuts and a zesty lemon‑mustard vinaigrette, perfect for a light lunch or dinner.
instructions: Wash and peel the Jerusalem artichokes, then slice them into 1/2‑inch rounds; rinse in cold water and pat dry.
Bring a pot of salted water to a gentle boil, reduce to a simmer, and poach the artichokes for 5–7 minutes until just tender.
Drain the artichokes and immediately transfer them to a bowl of ice water to stop the cooking; then drain again and pat dry.
Whisk together olive oil, lemon juice, Dijon mustard, salt, and pepper in a small bowl to create the vinaigrette.
Gently toss the warm artichokes with the vinaigrette until evenly coated.
Fold in the toasted pecans and chopped parsley, reserving a few nuts for garnish.
Serve the salad at room temperature or slightly chilled, garnished with the remaining nuts. Enjoy!
